Class Block

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.TransactionGroup
dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.structure.Block
All Implemented Interfaces:
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.ITxContainer, Cloneable
public class Block extends dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.TransactionGroup implements Cloneable
Represents a block in a blockchain. A Block extends TransactionGroup and contains information about the block's position in the chain, validation statistics, and node ownership.

This class is designed for use in blockchain simulations and supports cloning and equality checks.

See Also:
  • TransactionGroup
  • PoWNode
  • Transaction

  • Constructor Details

    • Block

      public Block()
      Constructs a new Block object with the next available ID.

    • Block

      public Block(List<dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.Transaction> initial)

      initial - initial list of transactions

  • Method Details

    • getNextID

      public static int getNextID()
      Retrieves the next unique ID for a new Block.
      Returns:
      the next block ID

    • resetCurrID

      public static void resetCurrID()
      Resets the next available block ID to 1. Useful for when starting a new simulation run.

    • getCurrID

      public static int getCurrID()

    • setCurrID

      public static void setCurrID(int currID)

    • validateBlock

      public void validateBlock(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.TransactionGroup newTransList, long simTime, long sysTime, int nodeID, String eventType, double difficulty, double cycles)
      Updates this Block with validation information. Typically invoked in response to a block validation event.
      Parameters:
      newTransList - the TransactionGroup representing validated transactions
      simTime - simulation time of the validation
      sysTime - system time of the validation
      nodeID - ID of the PoWNode performing validation
      eventType - textual description of the event (for logging)
      difficulty - difficulty under which the block was validated TODO: check if this is correct.
      cycles - computational cycles spent for validation

    • clone

      public Object clone() throws CloneNotSupportedException
      Returns a shallow copy of this block.
      Overrides:
      clone in class Object
      Returns:
      a clone of this block
      Throws:
      CloneNotSupportedException - if the superclass does not support cloning
